## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages, stack traces when relevant).

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS:
- Dotnet version (if applicable):
- Browser (if applicable):

## Possible solution (optional)

Ideas for how to fix or a workaround.

## Checklist

- [ ] I’ve searched existing issues
- [ ] I can reproduce this with the latest default branch
- [ ] I’ve included minimal reproduction steps and environment details
- [ ] PRs will follow Conventional Commits (enforced by commitlint)
